first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the justifications and strengths are substantively the same, praising the candidate's extensive experience, AI work, and software craftsmanship philosophy. The minor differences in the listed concerns (e.g., swapping a concern about testing frameworks for one about security best practices) are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation for a generative model. The evaluation of the candidate's skills and experience is unchanged, indicating the model was not relying on the redacted name or personal URLs.
